description: UVM AXI4 agent (active). Encapsulates the sequencer, driver and monitor. The driver and monitor get a handle to the virtual interface to drive/observe RTL signals. Operates in active mode.

ports.name: vif
ports.description: Virtual interface handle — passed to internal driver and monitor to connect to RTL

ports.name: seq_item_export
ports.description: Sequence item export — sequences connect here via TLM to reach the internal sequencer

ports.name: analysis_port
ports.description: Analysis port — internal monitor broadcasts observed transactions out to scoreboards via TLM
